---
title: "progress-report-srav26-isu"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
install.packages("janitor")
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(Lahman)
library(janitor)
```

```{r}
url <- "https://www.baseball-reference.com/awards/hof_2026.shtml"
```


```{r}
page <- read_html(url)

tables <- page %>% html_table(fill = TRUE)

# Look at tables
tables
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
